problem: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: If Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion is applied to quantum, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
